description_long: This warehouse is a cubic, modular structure composed of stacked concrete and blue metal panels, giving it a distinctly modern industrial appearance. The facade features a grid of nine large square sections, with alternating solid blue panels and textured, perforated metal grilles. The ground level includes two large display windows with posters and a single black-framed entry door, all set into a concrete base. Street lamps are positioned at the corners of the sidewalk platform, enhancing the urban context. The building lacks visible windows on the upper levels, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall design is geometric and repetitive, with a focus on durability and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, cubic warehouse with blue metal panels, concrete framing, and large display windows at street level. The structure is modular and industrial, with minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry door, two large display windows with posters, and a grid of blue and perforated metal panels above.
description_view_1: Opposite side features a similar grid, but with the entry door and display windows shifted to the right, and different poster content.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the depth of the modular sections, blue panels, and the absence of windows or doors on this face.
description_view_3: Rear side displays a continuation of the modular grid, with no entry points or windows, emphasizing the building's solid, secure nature.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is composed of a grid of large square sections, alternating between solid blue metal panels and perforated metal grilles, framed by exposed concrete. The ground level features two large glass display windows with posters and a single black-framed entry door, all set into a concrete base.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and constructed from concrete, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop features, maintaining a clean and utilitarian profile.
